name: Mexican Rice Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice cakes on a baking sheet.
2. Spread refried beans evenly on each rice cake.
3. Top with picante sauce, shredded cheese, and sliced jalapeno peppers.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes.
5. Serve immediately.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
1. Prepare the rice cakes as directed on the packaging.
2. Cook uncovered on HIGH power for 1-1/2 minutes; rotate after 1 minute.
3. Serve immediately.
